refugeeCaravan.name: Refugee Caravan
refugeeCaravan.text: Families from contested borderlands ask Olundar for shelter before the undead close the roads.

choices.name: Shelter Them
choices.text: Spend stores now for population, morale, and influence.

choices.name: Escort to Allies
choices.text: Send them through friendly routes to improve living-faction relations.

choices.name: Emergency Levy
choices.text: Arm the able-bodied quickly, gaining a spear guard at a morale cost.

famineStores.name: Thin Granaries
famineStores.text: Food stores are running low enough that the next campaign season could turn hunger into panic.

choices.name: Strict Rations
choices.text: Recover food by rationing, but morale suffers.

choices.name: Buy Grain
choices.text: Spend coin and favors to refill stores without hurting morale.

choices.name: Frontier Forage
choices.text: Send teams into nearby wilds for modest food and a scouting party.

cityRaid.name: Night Raid Warning
cityRaid.text: Scouts report undead raiders or opportunists testing roads near Olundar holdings after dusk.

choices.name: Raise Night Watch
choices.text: Reinforce city and outpost defenses before the raid lands.

choices.name: Evacuate Outskirts
choices.text: Pull civilians inward, saving morale and food but losing population.

choices.name: Counter-Raid
choices.text: Muster a spear guard and seize the initiative.

emergencyCouncil.name: Emergency Council
emergencyCouncil.text: Envoys, captains, priests, and quartermasters demand a ruling before the living front fractures.

choices.name: Send Envoys
choices.text: Improve relations with discovered civilizations and steady morale.

choices.name: War Levy
choices.text: Raise a legionary quickly, accepting strain at home.

choices.name: Fortify Gates
choices.text: Harden city, walls, and watchtowers for the coming siege.
